summary: Comprehensive testing completed for EdgeLog new features: Cloudinary screenshot uploads, AI-powered performance reports, and social media sharing. Backend 95.2% success rate, frontend fully functional with all new features working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Individual report retrieval occasionally returns 404 immediately after generation
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Generated report not immediately available for GET requests
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Reports accessible via /api/reports list endpoint and frontend generation works correctly
